title: Tilray Brands Posts Surprise Profit, Revenue Tops Estimates in Q3 2026
text: Tilray Brands delivered a surprise profit in fiscal Q3 2026, reporting adjusted earnings of $0.02 per share versus analyst expectations of a $0.14 loss. CEO Irwin Simon attributed this to successful execution of our strategic plan, delivering strong revenue growth, improved profitability, and significant cash generation. Total revenue reached $206.7 million, up 11% year-over-year and exceeding the $201.4 million consensus estimate. Cannabis net revenue grew 19% to $64.8 million, with international cannabis sales surging 73%. Adjusted EBITDA increased 19% to $10.7 million. Cash position: $265 million. Cannabis flower sales volume doubled. Canadian cannabis operations grew 8%. The BrewDog acquisition enhanced distribution networks across Europe, the Middle East, Australia, Asia-Pacific, and the United States, strengthening the beverage segment's role in overall strategy. Tilray reaffirmed full-year adjusted EBITDA guidance of $62-$72 million, representing 13-31% growth. However, analyst sentiment remains cautious with a consensus Hold rating, and the stock trades below its 100-day average despite the positive results.
